verification_scope: Define and photograph the repeatable cargo_front reference plane
Record the installed partition rear face or absence of a partition
Measure driver and passenger wheel-well X start and end from cargo_front
Measure clear sliding-door opening X start and end from cargo_front
Establish the conservative rear boundary for the selected placement
Identify only major visible no-mount zones affecting placements
Verify structure at actual proposed attachment locations
Record raw OEM or finished floor and thickness
Record liner type thickness and mounting impact
Operate the applicable doors and verify the actual placement envelope
